description:
Product information:

Material: steel wire, elastic mesh, feather, plush mouse, sisal hemp ball
Product category: set toy

Size: about 50cm long, about 20cm in diameter

A: Rat Feather Straight Clause
B: Sisal Ball Feather Straight Clause


Features:

Foldable for easy storage, no space
Two of their own suspended from the toy swing from side to side, lure the cat into the tunnel
Made of environmentally friendly materials, safe and odorless cats can rest assured to play.


Packing list:

1×Cat toys
